Headline Ideas:  ** Specific #’s and story details will be edited for accuracy**



Attention women over 30 who want to stop losing the same 10 pounds over and over again...



Out-of-shape 37-yr old mom goes from feeling “invisible” to looking like a swimsuit model in minutes a day with Flexible Fat Release... 



How a frantic ER visit led one woman to discover “Flexible Fat Release”

and go from feeling invisible to looking like a swimsuit model in just minutes a day...



This simple and powerful weight-loss method is being used by over 10,471 women to fight unwanted fat, drop dress sizes, and feel Fabulous & Fit! 

Even better, it doesn’t require any new equipment, any hard to access food, or even to leave the house! 























SALES LETTER STARTS HERE**Edited for accuracy**





Hey it’s Ingrid here,



And over the next few minutes I’m going to tell you the unusual story about a frantic visit to the emergency room.



It led to the moment I was forced to admit how overweight I’d become.



See…



Even with doctors and nurses scattered around…



… Beeping and buzzing of machines in my ears…



… When everyone was trying to figure out how to help me live...



I wasn’t even thinking about being in the hospital.



It’s like time stopped…



But my mind was racing faster than ever...



For the past year, thoughts whirled through my head about carrying an extra 53 pounds of fat on my body...



I’d look at pictures from when I was in my 20’s and WISH I could look as fit again.



But now, I would stuff and hide any extra inches with suffocating shapewear.



And forget wearing jeans in “my size” anymore.  I’d given up shopping in my section a long time ago.



But right now was different.



I was in a hospital gown with no way to hide it.  



The only thought I had?



I didn’t want to DEAL with being overweight.



It wasn’t who I was INSIDE.



I used to be the life of the party…



Everyone wanted me around because I made them FEEL great about themselves.



I looked great in a tight pair of jeans and knew it!



But now, I wasn’t the person they met.



Well I was… but I was stuck in a body that was NOT mine...  and it showed.



And the worst part is that I couldn’t help thinking that my best friends were ALL laughing behind my back about how I let myself go.



Every whisper made me wonder what they were talking about…



When we’re all out together… I could tell there was something going on. 



And all I knew is that I didn’t want to hide my weight anymore.



I wanted it gone for good.



But coming from a family where most of the women are overweight…



… and having a little bit “extra” meant you were “normal”



Even my mother would say…



“Ingrid… so many people go hungry without food, finish your meal!!”



It’s part of our culture, so I get it...



But for me…



I was spinning out of control.



I was lethargic…



My body didn’t really FEEL like my own anymore…



But on the outside I had to put on a brave face.



I was going through my life without a care in the world…



I was happily married to the man of my dreams.



I got a bit “comfortable...”



By the time of our wedding I was a size 16!



But after a while, the happiness on the outside didn’t match how I felt on the inside.



I started wearing the same outfit everyday…



And inside, I was feeling more and more “low…”



I was out of breath from just running in to drop off groceries…



And when I ran into my old friends in public, I’d avoid them on purpose because I felt ashamed about how I looked.



It was like nobody understood the REAL me.



And nobody could SEE what was truly happening in my life.



Like I didn’t exist.



And being 53 pounds overweight, I didn’t WANT people to notice me.



Even though on the outside, my life was all I could ask for...



At night I had strange cravings for pasta and ice cream that I couldn’t ignore.



Over time I started to accept the idea that I’d be overweight my whole life.



That my clothes would always fit a bit tighter…



I’d never be able to fit into my favorite jeans again that ALL of my skinny friends wore…



That I would always get strange looks if I ordered dessert...



But the worst part?



I worried I’d never feel like ME again…



This went on for 2 long years.  



Living with the idea that ONE DAY I would make a change.



That eventually…



When the time was right…



I would release the weight and get back to the REAL me.



.



Fast forward to 2 years later on New Year's Day…



I was STILL carrying around the same weight…



And I felt it.  



Even though I was surrounded by friends and family…



When I logged into Facebook to check out pictures from our party…



I was mortified....



My face looked puffy…



My belly was sticking out of my dress…



My neck must have disappeared…



Honestly I didn’t recognize myself.



And that moment…



In the midst of feeling so ashamed and embarrassed about how I looked and felt...



I never felt so empowered as I did at that moment.



So I made a decision about my health.



I made a decision for my family… 



And I made a decision for myself.



You may have noticed, I look a bit different than I did that day.



[sidebar with great bikini photos of Ingrid / COVER MAG PHOTOS]



Over 8 years later, I’m proud to report I am now healthier than ever.



And I’m also grateful for this hard time in my life.



Because while I was doing whatever it took to be a Mom…



This weird turn of events led me down a path of discovery that has allowed me to...



… Safely lose 53 pounds…



… Maintain my goal weight for over 8 years…



… Rebuild a strong, passionate relationship where I feel CONFIDENT in myself with my loving husband, Jeff.



And this journey would also show me some of the sneakier sides of the fitness industry…



Specifically how some trainers will do anything to make a few extra dollars at your expense…



So I want to help you out today and share the truth about what works to maintain a healthy weight...



And how it led me to uncover an unusual ”Flexible Fat Release” secret that confirms you don’t need strict, tiresome meal plans at all.



You’ll see how this secret took me from my heaviest ever…



At 195 pounds...



[BEFORE PICTURE…]



To…



Losing 53 pounds in 90 days… 



Being a featured expert on over 200 different TV and radio shows and also magazines…



Reaching more than 300 million people monthly on my Facebook page with nutrition and exercise tips…

Over 3 million subscribers through my blog…

More than 136 million views on my YouTube Channel on topics like Keto, “Carb Confusion” and other nutrition and health topics…



And becoming 3 time NPC Florida Bikini Champion!



[PICTURES / PROOF / SIDEBAR w/ tons of credentials through this whole section (from after photo… barrage of proof imagery here...]



But the thing I’m most proud of is building a strong, loving and passionate relationship with my husband Jeff, and being a leader in my family...



[PICTURES of family]



And get this:



I did it all with:



NO counting calories… That’s right!  Not a single one.When meal options are designed for nutrition density over caloric density, it’s possible to eat MORE volume of certain food while maintaining goals.

NO weird ingredients or hard-to-find supplements…Everything I cook is readily available (so no matter how much of a run there is on supplies… I’ll share which grocery section is usually stocked and plentiful!)

NO worrying about all those eyes staring and judging…Everything I do is direct from home… so that you can do it by yourself or with a friend… but this is a zero judgement zone.So all this together means…

NO STRESS!  Just an enjoyable, supportive way to look and feel great!



Truth is, for the past 8 years I’ve had the time of my life.



I can’t wait to share how it can help... 



Resist temptations for unhealthy foods and reduce cravings...

Boost metabolism and the amount of calories burned per day…

Manage weight while enjoying favorite foods that were once “off-limits” ...

And thousands struggle with unwanted weight at no fault of their own.

 

You see, well-intended coaches or trainers from the gym are so busy with their current clients that it’s impossible to stay up on the latest research…



So they preach bad ideas like cutting carbs and suffering through long hours of cardio at the gym which can wreak havoc on your metabolism and fat-burning hormones…



Those approaches can only work if you're lucky or follow them EXACTLY as prescribed.



But who can do that?  We’re all human.



It’s important to be flexible with yourself...



So if you finally want to know a powerful way to help...

Rid extra, unwanted weight (*an average of 12.4 pounds!) so you can feel great in a pair of jeans… fit into your favorite dress that hugs you in all the right places…

Feel more energy during the day, for all the things you love to do… like dancing, going out with your family for walks that don’t end…

Enjoy mealtime again because you’re eating delicious, nutritious, and easy-to-prep dishes that your entire family loves…

Maintain healthy stress levels so you can approach life with calmness no matter what is going on around you…

*Results not typical



Listen.



The world is going to tell you what THEY think you should do…



That you should join a boot camp… or a celebrity-endorsed mass-market weight program or buy weird ingredients you can’t even pronounce…



But if you’re sick of being told that you have to stick to a strict diet or exercise plan, or follow an exhausting workout routine that gives you more injuries than curves...



You’re in luck.  



Because not only will you discover...

Why sticking to ONE meal plan could actually HALT your progress…

How “getting your 10,000 steps” is the #1 WORST thing to do if you want to release weight and get strong…

And how Flexible Fat Release may actually be the most effective trick for losing more weight… feel more energetic and alive… look sexier and FEEL like a more connected, powerful woman.



You’re going to discover all this, and the strange way my frantic ER visit led me to discover how…



“Flexible Fat Release” Helps Women Over 30 Release An Average Of 12.4 Pounds Without Counting Calories!



Listen…



It doesn’t matter what you’ve tried before because I did it all, too…



I did Paleo, Keto, CrossFit, Pilates, Vegan, Carnivore, Ice-Chips…



You name it, I did it.



And I’ll be the first to tell you...



Nothing worked as well as Flexible Fat Release for releasing weight that doesn’t respond to traditional plans…



And the reason why will shock you. 



It goes against everything I held so dear. 



I’ll share everything in a second...



But first…



It’s important you know that it’s not only me who received almost unbelievable results…



[TESTIMONIALS]



How An Emergency Room Disaster Helped Me Uncover The REAL Reason Diets & Supplements NEVER Worked For Me (And The #1 Way I Lost 53 Pounds…)



Hi, I’m Ingrid Macher…



And if we haven’t met before…



At the young age of 19, I came to Puerto Rico looking for the American Dream.



In a matter of 3 years I studied communications at Universidad del Sagrado Corazón...Got married in San Juan…



Divorced...



I had a daughter who is now 24…



And after 7 years of being a single mother in a new country…



I met the love of my life, Jeff…



I got married again…



And like so many who are in love, I quickly gained 53 pounds!



I thought I was happy.



My life was FULL of life and love.



I had everything I ever wished for…



Until I was 7 months pregnant with my second child...



This is something I’d never experienced before.



In a moment it was like all the decisions up to that point were put in front of me.



Because on Christmas Eve…



I was alone at our home taking care of my Mother.



And in an instant… I couldn’t breathe.



The walls were shutting in and nobody could help.



It felt like my throat was being sat on by a Sumo wrestler…



And I was losing the fight.



12 seconds later...



NOTHING.



I wish I could tell you, but I don’t remember ANYTHING else from that day.



After 4 hours…



I woke up staring straight into an unfamiliar ceiling unsure of WHAT just happened.



Turns out that out of nowhere I developed asthma.  



The Doctors didn’t know why and at that moment I didn’t care.



I was grateful to be alive.



But on top of being confused about why I was in a hospital bed…



I woke up with a new outlook on life.



I had an unusual motivation to DO SOMETHING bigger.



Anyone who’s had a close-call says something similar.



For me, I was given a second chance.  



A second chance that before, I may have taken for granted.



But with an extra 53 pounds…



With my clothes starting to fit tighter and me not wanting to look at pictures of myself…



With my body feeling older and less flexible...



And because I was starting to have trouble recognizing myself with an extra ‘layer’ padding...



Even though I felt great on the inside…



My extra weight was holding me back from doing all the things I wanted to do.



This lasted almost 2 years...



Then in the 2008 economic crisis, my husband Jeff & I lost everything.



From having everything, we went to having nothing.  



We lost medical insurance, access to important care…



And at the time when I was 53 pounds overweight…



Staring at pictures of myself from New Years Eve the previous night…



Knowing that if we needed medical care, we couldn’t afford it… 



And with all the strain on the healthcare system already…



I broke down in that moment knowing I had to make a change.



I needed to focus on my health because I wanted to see my children grow…



I promised to watch my daughters get married…



And spend the rest of my life with the man I love the most.



So I decided to take control of my health.



I threw all the JUNK from the kitchen in the trash.



Nothing went into my body that I didn’t understand.



For 90 days I cooked 100% of my meals at home focused on specific nutrition plans that I KNEW worked.



Nothing without years of scientific proof…



And at the time, because my doctor told me to “add more flexibility…”



I did!



So for a week, I made Keto meals like…



[Keto meal pics]



Then I tried Paleo and devoured dishes like…



[Paleo meal pics]



And shockingly mouth-watering Vegan meals like…



[Vegan meal pics]



I tried everything.



Most of it was a bit “blah…”



But there were a few dishes I loved so much!



What REALLY worked was doing things MY way.



That’s right...



I tossed out every piece of advice andhopped from fad-diet to fad-diet for 90 days...



Then after my 90-day test I checked my weight…



I was eating delicious foods every day so I expected to maybe have lost a few pounds…



But get this: I lost the entire 53 pounds!



I couldn’t believe it.



I thought the darn thing was broken. 



So I checked again and it was working just fine…



I danced around my house…



Screamed for my husband Jeff to come and see what happened…



And I told him I wanted to “try” something out.



So we went to the HOTTEST boutique in town…



I walked up to my DREAM jeans that I could never fit into before…



And instead of picking the biggest pair on the rack…



I picked my goal size…



So while I was in the changeroom I started to scream...



“Jeff!  you’re never going to believe it..



He ran to the change room and I whipped the curtain open..





“Look!  These jeans fit like a glove…And they’re a size ZERO!”



It was like I finally achieved the results I wanted.



All the years of struggle and being uncertain if I would be a bigger girl forever was wiped away in a moment.



I knew I could do this.



I knew it was WORTH it.



And I knew I could help others.



So then later that week…



I showed up at a family party…



But when I walked in…



My own family didn’t even recognize me!



And I dress to impress.



I’ve always worn clothes that show my figure.



[pics of Ingrid in skirts / on TV in dresses etc…]



As a woman, that’s a part of me that I LOVE to express.



So when my friends and family saw me that night…



I was smiling inside because I knew the hard work and dedication it took to get here had paid off.



And once my friends realized it was me…



Flaunting my brand new body…



In brand new trendy jeans I could NEVER buy before…



They couldn’t believe it.



Truth is…



They wanted my secret.



And these were my friends…



So I wanted to HELP them figure it out, too.



See, they couldn’t help wonder...



How I went from being an “invisible woman”to looking like a bikini model in 90 days!



And I thought to myself...



Wait.  If this worked for me…



I’m sure it will work for them.



So before I spilled the beans about exactly how I did it...



I looked back at the last 90 days and realized I may have stumbled upon the most “backward” way to lose weight and keep it off.



I thought… 



… “What if  we SHOULD hop from “fad diet” to “fad diet” instead of sticking with 1 plan forever...”



… What if we could enjoy our favorite meal plans… not just one boring set of dishes… and still get the body and results that we want!?



… What if we could gain control, confidence and clarity over ALL factors in maintaining a healthy weight.



Even outside of just food and fitness, what if we are in FULL control?



Well this thought gave me the drive & inspiration to educate myself as a certified holistic health coach, sports nutritionist, certified personal trainer, NLP Master Coach…



And now #1 best selling author…



… Named “Most Influential Expert in Nutrition & Fitness in the Hispanic Community…”



… a 3-time NPC bikini champion…



And along with my husband Jeff, co-founded Burn20 — a health and wellness company on a mission to help millions of women follow a healthy lifestyle…



… without neglecting their role as mothers, wives, and professionals.



It all has to do with how...



“Flexible Fat Release” helped me safely lose 53 pounds without counting a single calorie...



See, back when I was sitting with my Doctor and telling him everything I was doing to help turn my health around…



Knowing my nutritional background and everything I’d tried…



I got straight to the point.



I said, “Over the past 7 months, I’ve lost almost ALL of my unwanted weight…”



“And I did it all by going against everything I was told.”



I told myself, “Stop being so strict… give yourself some FLEXIBILITY.”



So I looked into some more research and found that so many recent discoveries prove what I thought all along...



“... whether it’s Paleo, Atkins, Keto, Carnivore, Vegan, or something else, studies show that a SINGLE focus over the long term can HURT your results!”



I didn’t understand.



All my training and education in nutrition led me to believe that when you want a SPECIFIC result… it is best to take a TARGETED approach.



But when I started to become more “flexible” in my choices, I couldn’t disagree with the results.



So here’s what I did.



I knew that different people respond differently to meal plans.



To see what worked best for me...



I tried Keto for a month…



Then Vegan for a month…



Then Paleo-Fit…



The main goal was to see how my SPECIFIC body responds.



Because there are food plans that may just NOT work for you.



So how are you going to know… if you don’t try?



For example, you likely know the Keto diet is mostly fat, with a moderate amount of protein and carbs.



And Keto is fantastic.



Lots of people do the Keto diet to help their body burn fat for energy rather than carbs or sugar…



And some can stay on Keto for a LONG time.



In fact, we have some ladies who stay in Keto for months and months…



Sometimes YEARS because it is what works for their particular body.



Now, eating the same thing for YEARS is a long time for anyone.



But switching up how you eat every week can be a daunting task.



That’s why we recommend staying on a plan like Keto for at least three weeks to give you the best opportunity for creating good habits in your life.



And to make matters worse for people wanting to lose a few pounds…



Turns out...



The #1 worst habit for getting stronger, and keeping off weight was revealed in a brand new study from Brigham Young University...



Have you heard how getting 10,000 steps is some sort of “magic” number that will keep you from putting on unwanted weight?



Well that couldn’t be farther from the truth.



And yes, there are great health benefits from walking, especially for overall health.



So I always recommend getting your body moving.



But when it comes to preventing weight gain…



Walking 10,000 steps a day isn’t the best use of your time.



This study took a group of college freshmen — healthy young students.



The goal was to see if “getting their steps in” was enough to stop them from gaining weight.



And just like my Doctor said…



It’s NOT!



Turns out “no number of steps alone will do the trick…”



And the list goes on…



So here’s what all this means:



You could be on the PERFECT Keto diet…



You could get your “10,000 steps in” …



You could be in the PRIME of your life like some of the men and women in the studies…



And even still, you could be left with frustrating results, or none at all.No wonder it’s confusing.And then on top of not seeing any results from your efforts…Keeping on weight can impact every area of your life and make you feel like you’re not in control.On the other hand, when you walk into a room you want to command respect like a strong, fabulous woman who knows her value.And when you follow Flexible Fat Release like I’m about to show you…



You CAN start to see results…



Because for the first time, you’re focusing on ALL areas of your life.



But first...



Now That You Know What NOT To Do…



You know that sticking to 1 plan is not going to work long term.



You know that walking on the treadmill, or getting your steps in isn’t going to give you the tight, toned, strong, sexy body that you deserve.  



So what DOES work?



Well…



You’d think if sticking with ONE plan doesn’t provide results over the long term…



The simple answer is to “mix it up” , right?



Well, not exactly.



See, that’s what I did at the beginning.



It worked temporarily, but then I plateaued.



Shortly after...



I created a “flexible structure” so that over the next 90 days, I could jump from fad to fad... and still lose pounds.



So I was Keto for a month…



I was Vegan for a month…



And then I took a BREAK for a week…



And in the end...



Using “Flexible Fat Release” I Lost 53 pounds…Dropped from a size 16 to a zero... Feel 10 years younger… And fit into my skinny jeans again!



So now I had my own results…



But I still wanted to know if it worked to help release weight that wouldn’t respond to more traditional methods in other people.



And at the same time, word got out about how I looked and I started getting asked to share what I was doing…



So after sharing personally with women in my local area…



And seeing results like this…



[TESTIMONIAL]



And like this…



[TESTIMONIAL]



And being featured on over 50 shows…



[AS SEEN ON / IMAGES FROM SHOWS…]



I’m proud to announce that all these results gave me CLEAR direction on what worked for women to finally release unwanted pounds, and also to maintain their weight… 



Because there’s nothing worse than losing the same weight over and over again, right!?



So after many tireless nights of research and meal planning...



The 28-DayFabulous & Fit Challenge

was born!



In Our Last 28 Day Fabulous & Fit Challenge Contestants Lost An AVERAGE Of 12.4 Pounds!



At the end of each challenge, I survey contestants about how they felt before starting… and how they’re doing after.



I’m continually adjusting and improving our process so new participants get even better results.



Our last survey shows our AVERAGE participant lost 12.4 pounds!



This blows my mind!



Here are some more results of women who finished the challenge!





[SOCIAL MEDIA TESTIMONIAL WALL]







So if you’re ready to start your journey towards the body you DESERVE…



Here’s What You’ll Get When You Decide To Join Us Today...



The 28-Day Fabulous & Fit Challenge contains everything you need to flatten your belly… tone your sexy curves… maintain a strong mindset… build confidence… and so much more.



I know how it feels to make TOUGH decisions.



Decisions that feel like work now… but create a new and beautiful future that you can’t even imagine.



I want to make this decision easier for you.



Because when you choose yourself and move towards powerful decisions, you are allowing for GREAT things to appear in your life.



Let me walk you through the28-Day Fabulous & Fit Challenge



Component #1:  28-Days of Delicious, Nutritious, Metabolism-Supporting and AFFORDABLE Meals…

We all LOVE food, right?  And when we use it properly, it can fuel your body… while also helping you clear out toxins and excess waste that clogs up your organs.



So week 1 of your Challenge is a brand-new detox we reformulate every 4 months.  We see what is working best, and take the feedback of our members to heart.



Then for 3 weeks, you simply follow one of 4 eating styles chosen by you: keto, vegan, vegetarian, or “paleo-fit.”



And with Flexible Meal Prep, you learn to manage cravings in a gradual way…



You’ll get easy 5-15 minute recipes that don't require a lot of time in the kitchen so you can enjoy more time with your family… meals like...



[meal pics]







Component #2:  28-Days of Metabolism-Boosting Workouts You Can Do From Your Living Room...

These daily workouts focus on quick, effective metabolism-boosting exercise routines…



Do the exercises in your own time on your own schedule, in as little as 8 minutes. *hint, use full-body tension to ensure MAXIMUM results in MINIMUM time.



So, no matter if you’re stuck at home… or able to get to a gym… 



These workouts will rev up your metabolism and support your physical, mental, and even emotional health.  



Because moving your body does more than make you look great…



It helps your mood… your mindset… your outlook… EVERYTHING!



So if you’re stuck inside, this is a great way to lift your mood!



And no matter your fitness level, there’s something for you because every workout includes modifications.  

Plus, these workouts are great for anyone who is starting to feel more joint discomfort or stiffness.



If you have injuries or want to ease in, you can take it slow at the beginning and move up in level as you get more comfortable!Or, if you’re more experienced, you can add difficulty to the workouts from day 1…There’s something for everyone who wants tighter, more toned muscles and to give their metabolism a daily bump!





Component #3:  Motivational Meditations To Keep You Excited And Moving Towards Your Goals...



Making healthy meal choices… moving your body in new ways… or even setting goals can be a bit scary.



That’s why everyday you’ll have motivational meditations to help keep you going.



You’re never alone on your journey. We’ve all needed a bit of support along the way.



With quick and effective meditations you can listen to anytime, anywhere…



You’re going to feel more on track with your goals so you can stick to your plan!







Component #4:  Exclusive Online Video Conferences With Expert Coaches…



Every week, we host private video conferences for our members ranging from health, beauty & happiness, to interviewing stylists about make-up, experts on relationships, sexuality, love, and so much more.And the focus on community and ongoing motivation makes this program unique and effective in achieving your idea of happiness & a healthy lifestyle.





Plus, You’ll Get FREE Access To My Private Facebook Group As A Free Special BONUS For Joining Today!



When you join today, I’ll also give you our most popular bonus.



I’ve arranged for a private Facebook group to be available for the entire 28-Days while you’re going through this challenge.



So you can start meeting other women who will walk beside you through this challenge.



You get 24/7 support from those struggling with similar challenges…



You can see SUCCESS STORIES from other women to keep you motivated and inspired…



You’ll even get DIRECT ACCESS to me throughout the challenge as your coach!



This is why Fab & Fit is helping women over 30 lose weight… feel great… and so much more!



And the last thing we want is for you to be overwhelmed with information.



That’s why we send you the content over the course of the 28 day challenge.



And you can always access the Facebook group for support along the way.



It’s so easy to do… takes almost no time…



But we’re starting soon, so don’t delay!



There are only 57 spots remaining today...



I am reserving the next 57 spots exclusively for readers of this letter… 



The 28 Day Fabulous & Fit Challenge is your chance to finally get results after all the work you’ve put in.



You don’t have to join a gym which could close anytime…



The 28-Day Fabulous & Fit Challenge includes my best fat-burning workouts…



You’ll get my favorite metabolism-supporting meals which provide the EXACT day-to-day eating plan…



The workouts and meal plans are perfect for women over 30 who may have struggled with endless cardio sessions, useless bootcamps, and bland-tasting meals.



If you want to lose unwanted weight in the next 28 days.



If you want to get more in tune with yourself and your goals…



From your food choices… fitness decisions… family connections… and more…



I want you to believe it’s possible for you.



With all your heart…



Believe that you deserve to live in a beautiful, sexy body…



Not for anyone else, but for YOU.



And if you want the BEST chance at achieving your goals.



The New 28-Day Fabulous & Fit Challenge Is Open For The Lowest Enrollment Fee EVER — Here’s Why…





With multiple meal plan selections…



Various in-home or in-the-gym workouts…



And calming, but motivating mindset exercises…



You’d expect The 28-Day Fabulous & Fit Challenge to cost a small fortune.



And when I was first looking for answers on my own journey…



I met coach after coach who promised the world… then would send me a fat bill.



The worst situation was with a friend of mine who said they could help with my weight.



I trusted him with everything.



He was around during my illness and I believed my best interests were at heart.



Then, after sending over $3,000 USD to pay for personal nutrition coaching…



And after receiving BASIC information I could have downloaded from the internet…



After calling over and over letting him know I was not happy…



I actually GAINED weight.



That was an expensive, and humbling lesson.



So I get it if you’re skeptical.



But there are also some amazing experts you can learn from.



Because when you finally find something that works... from someone you trust… it’s all worth it.



As you’ve seen, this challenge brings new opportunities to women over 30 who thought they were “stuck” with their extra weight.
